Name: Kickoff: CI Federation Initiative
Description: Confirm goals, owners, and timeline for federated CI model. Lock Azure as sole deploy authority.

Name: Create pipeline inventory across providers
Description: Catalog all active jobs in Azure/GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket with trigger type, runtime, and outcome.

Name: Map capability ownership matrix
Description: Assign single source of truth owner for each CI capability (security scan, lint, test, AI validation, deploy).

Name: Define duplication removal list
Description: Identify jobs duplicated across providers and mark keep/migrate/retire.

Name: Publish CI operating model RFC
Description: Write and share concise RFC with rules: one deploy authority, one owner per capability, artifact lineage.

Name: Approval checkpoint: ownership and RFC
Description: Confirm approval to proceed with consolidation and gate implementation.

Name: Standardize command contract
Description: Normalize lint/type/test/security commands to shared scripts (pnpm/uv) so all CI providers call same commands.

Name: Consolidate GitHub security lane
Description: Keep CodeQL/SARIF/security scans in GitHub and remove overlapping scans elsewhere where appropriate.

Name: Consolidate GitLab MR quality lane
Description: Keep fast MR checks in GitLab (lint/type/unit/integration), tune for speed and failure clarity.

Name: Consolidate Bitbucket AI validation lane
Description: Keep AI/data/governance checks in Bitbucket and align triggers to AI-related path changes and schedules.

Name: Disable duplicate non-owner jobs
Description: Retire or disable duplicate jobs according to matrix and capture rationale.
Dependencies: Consolidate GitHub security lane;Consolidate GitLab MR quality lane;Consolidate Bitbucket AI validation lane

Name: Add branch and path trigger policy
Description: Implement path and branch filters so each provider runs only relevant jobs.

Name: Design release-readiness schema
Description: Define required statuses and pass criteria consumed by Azure pre-deploy gate.

Name: Implement readiness aggregator endpoint/script
Description: Build lightweight status collector to aggregate provider results into single readiness signal.

Name: Wire readiness check into Azure pre-deploy stage
Description: Add gate requirement before AKS deploy can proceed in Azure pipeline.

Name: Run dry-run promotion tests (staging)
Description: Execute staged dry runs: failing check blocks deploy; green checks allow deploy.
Dependencies: Wire readiness check into Azure pre-deploy stage;Add branch and path trigger policy

Name: Create CI failure auto-ticketing rules
Description: Define auto-create/update issue/task behavior for critical security failures and AI validation regressions.

Name: Build CI operations dashboard
Description: Track key metrics: duplicate job count, PR feedback time, failed checks by lane, deploy gate failures.

Name: Define weekly operating review
Description: Set recurring review template with KPI checks, incidents, and optimization backlog.

Name: Write runbook and escalation map
Description: Document where each check lives, owners, break/fix process, and escalation path.
Dependencies: Build CI operations dashboard;Define weekly operating review

Name: Final acceptance review
Description: Validate goals met and transition to BAU with ownership handoff.
Dependencies: Write runbook and escalation map;Wire readiness check into Azure pre-deploy stage
